title: Three-Way Triage
intendedTensionBeat: Three puppies create broad triage, but their order must still be readable.
intendedReleaseBeat: Saving the first correct target should make the next pivot feel clear.
expectedPath: Rescue the most water-threatened or route-critical target first, pivot through the center, then finish the safest target.
expectedFailMode: Player half-solves all three and saves none efficiently.
designNotes: This is the first true triage board. Avoid making it feel like simultaneous chores.
